name: Quran App
overview: A Quran App  supporting mushaf reading, surah translation , ayah by ayah translation,word by word translation, tafsir and grammatical analysis of words and ayahs

name: AI-tools Aggregator
overview: This is an ai tools aggregator website. It allows the functionality to search AI tools based on categories and prices offering detailed information about each tool.

name: Percolation Modeling
overview: Modeling percolation using the weighted quick union data type and running trials to determine the value of threshold probability p

name: Deep Research agent
overview: A production-ready multi-agent autonomous research system built with LangGraph and LangChain. Four specialized agents collaborate to conduct comprehensive research on any topic, generating detailed citation-backed reports with credibility scoring and quality metrics.

name: Fake News Classification
overview: This project focuses on classifying news articles into two categories: fake news and true news, using various machine learning models and text vectorization techniques. The goal is to build a robust text classification model that can accurately distinguish between fake and true news.

name: Hotel Reservation System
overview: A fourth semester project mainly focusing on database design with minimal front end

name: Front end Projects
overview: These are my solutions to two front end mentor challeges. One is a social links profile, the other is a testimonial grid
